description_long: This object consists of three stylized flowers, each with distinct colors and petal arrangements. The largest flower is a vibrant red with multiple broad petals and a cluster of yellow and white stamens at its center. Adjacent to it is a slightly smaller pink flower, featuring pale petals and a central arrangement of greenish-white stamens. The third flower is blue, flatter, and simpler, with five rounded petals and a yellow center, lacking visible stamens. All flowers are open and display their reproductive structures prominently, with no visible stems or leaves. The petals are smooth and slightly curved, overlapping in a radial pattern. The overall appearance is decorative and artificial, suitable for ornamental use in urban parks or public spaces.
description: A group of three stylized, open flowers in red, pink, and blue, each with smooth, overlapping petals and prominent central details. The flowers are arranged together, displaying a decorative and artificial appearance.
description_view_0: The red flower is in the foreground, showing its yellow and white stamens clearly, with the pink and blue flowers behind it.
description_view_1: All three flowers are visible from the front, with the red flower on the left, pink in the center, and blue on the right, each displaying their open petals.
description_view_2: The pink flower is most prominent, with the red flower behind it and the blue flower to the left, highlighting the petal arrangement of the pink flower.
description_view_3: The red flower is on the right, showing its layered petals, while the pink flower is on the left and the blue flower is in the background.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration with overlapping and slightly layered placement, creating a symmetrical and open floral display.
